creator: sreeharisreedev1@gmail.com
text: This bug has also been affecting me on the ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen7. From digging around the codebase (I'm just a noob), it seems from my understanding that it's something introduced in sys/x86/cpufreq/hwpstate_intel.c, which is quite recent (commits starting on January 22, 2020, not merged into 12.x, and few enough commits for me to keep track of: git log sys/x86/cpufreq/hwpstate_intel.c). Once I get time I could try compiling each of the significant revisions starting with the one just before the introduction of the Speed Shift stuff and seeing which one breaks first. Could be wrong about all of this though.
